description: Two contrasting authored mandates for the live demo: a trust-first buyer and a deadline-driven seller. Same asset (WBTC), same anchor (USD 70,000). Different style, urgency, and disclosure posture produce visibly different round sequences.

policy.objective: Acquire strategic BTC exposure quietly; only improve terms once the counterparty proves settlement capacity.

valuationPolicy.note: Anchor on treasury fair value; hold for better terms until trust is established.

approvalPolicy.preferredEnvelopeNote: Settle only at or below the anchor plus the half-band.

policy.operatorInstructions: Open at the anchor. Reveal accredited_institution first, then ask for settlement_capacity. Only improve price once both verified. Walk away cleanly if disclosure stalls.

policy.objective: Reduce WBTC inventory by end of session; willing to disclose inventory sufficiency only after the buyer proves reciprocal seriousness.

valuationPolicy.note: Anchor on treasury fair value; concede faster to land a deal before the deadline.

approvalPolicy.preferredEnvelopeNote: Auto-settle inside the full walkaway band; the deadline drives concession.

policy.operatorInstructions: Ask for accredited_institution proof on the first round; reveal inventory_sufficiency only after the buyer reciprocates with a serious move. Concede quickly toward the deadline.
